description: Single source of behavioral truth for the engine. Every language port SHOULD run these vectors against its own engine so a behavior is specified ONCE here instead of re-asserted in 7 hand-written test files. Add or change a case here, then each port's conformance test picks it up. Reference consumer: packages/quran-engine-js/test/conformance.test.js. See docs/PORTING.md → 'Conformance vectors'.

searchVerses.note: regular search is a PURE substring — mid-word fragments match ("orld" in "worlds")
the `=` whole-word operator matches the whole token "lord"
whole-word: a partial token does NOT match
any decimal digit is rejected BEFORE the boolean path
numeric verse queries are rejected (they are surah/reference search)

juzStatsInvariant.note: the 30 juz partition the 6236 ayahs exactly

sajdah.note: the 15 prostration ayahs, detected by the ۩ mark (U+06E9)

muqattaat._spelledNote: spelledOutArabic is exact data (hard to assert literally cross-language); instead we check it carries the madd-lāzim maddah U+0653 so the tajweed pass colours it. The JS engine test checks the literal.

tajweed.note: At-Tariq ends in رُوَيۡدَۢا — tanwin-fath in the iqlaab form. At the stop the iqlaab is dropped and the final alif is a 2-count madd 'iwad.
